## Description
Provide a brief overview of the changes in this PR. 

## Related Issue
Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing scripts to fail)
- [ ] Performance optimization (VM loop or compiler speedups)

## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally.
- [ ] I have added a new `.cvm` file to the `tests/` directory to cover my changes.
- [ ] I have run the full test suite and all tests pass.
- [ ] My code adheres to the project's `.clang-format` style.
- [ ] I have updated the `README.md` if I added new language features or opcodes.
